raw_transcript: Yes. We need to stabilize you with IV hydration and high-dose Solu-Medrol. We also need to rule out secondary infections like C. diff or CMV which can complicate a flare.
final_corrected_note: Yes. We need to stabilize you with IV hydration and high-dose Solu-Medrol. We also need to rule out secondary infections like C. diff or CMV which can complicate a flare.
